nativeProps: React.InputHTMLAttributes<HTMLInputElement>, excluding type, value, defaultValue, name, and native onChange

compositionPolicy.native: One real text input owns editing, selection, undo, clipboard, autocomplete, validation, focus, and mobile input behavior; no browser or editor key is intercepted.
compositionPolicy.adapter: A required trusted synchronous adapter owns deterministic raw extraction, display formatting, validity, and caret mapping. Serialized masks, regular-expression strings, eval, runtime compilation, and remote executable definitions are unsupported.
compositionPolicy.forms: The visible formatted input has no form name. An optional hidden same-form input serializes the explicitly selected raw or formatted value.
compositionPolicy.recovery: Invalid adapter results must preserve the exact visible input, so an error cannot silently delete user text and recovery remains editable.
compositionPolicy.field: ID, label, description, error, required, and invalid relationships are inherited from Field unless explicitly supplied.
